title: Tools & the Tool Age
subtitle: Why your workers can only use what the age allows

pages.text: Your settlement has a current &6tool age&r: bone, then wood, then stone, then iron. Research advances it. A worker can only equip a tool of the settlement's tool age or lower, so a stone-age tribe cannot hand out iron picks even if it finds one.

You begin in the &6bone age&r with bone tools and a flint knife. Researching Wood Refining unlocks wooden tools and the wood age; Knapping unlocks stone; Iron Working unlocks iron and advances the era to Medieval.
Jobs read the tool age too. A worker's job tab shows the tool slot it needs; put a valid tool there, or mark a tool storage so workers of that type pull one automatically.
